paths.name: heroui-native
paths.message: Use modular HeroUI Native imports instead, like "heroui-native/provider" or "heroui-native/[component-name]". The list of available modular exports is available here: https://heroui.com/docs/native/getting-started/quick-start

paths.name: react-native
paths.message: Do not use React Native Text component. Use Text from heroui-native/text instead
